meaning: 符拉迪沃斯托克[苏联远东区港市](中国传统称海参崴)
examples: Vladivostok has the highest number of cars per capita among all Russian cities.
And this is the quay of Vladivostok and a submarine beside it that now serves as a museum.
We were not going all the way to Vladivostok, but we were to spend the next four nights on board.
One revealing point of intersection between Russia and the new China is the Vladivostok Hotel .
Agalarov is also building in Vladivostok in anticipation of the APEC summit scheduled for September 2012.
